checks.description: Pagination landmark uses <nav> with aria-label. Current page uses aria-current='page'. Non-interactive overflow uses aria-hidden='true'.
checks.notes: Implemented per contract. Requires QA verification.

checks.description: Current page is not indicated by color alone. Font-weight (400→600) change is also present alongside the green bottom indicator.
checks.notes: Color is supplementary. Font-weight change is the primary non-color indicator.

checks.description: Text color var(--Text-text-default, #161616) on white background. Estimated ratio: ~16.1:1.
checks.notes: Requires formal contrast check with final token values in production.

checks.description: Focus outline: 2px solid #161616 on white = ~16:1 ratio. Passes.
All interactive elements (page buttons, nav buttons) are native <button> elements. Fully keyboard accessible.
checks.notes: Overflow span is non-interactive and excluded from tab order.

checks.description: All interactive elements show :focus-visible outline. Focus is never suppressed.
Large (40px) and Medium (32px) meet recommended 24px minimum. Small (24px) meets the absolute minimum but is below the recommended 44px for touch.
checks.notes: Small size touch target is 24px — below recommended 44px. Flag for stakeholder review. Not a blocker for non-touch contexts.

checks.description: All component-level pagination tokens are missing from token.css.
checks.notes: Fallback values are used. Token definitions must be added to token.css before production. See analysis.md Missing Tokens.

checks.description: Pressed and Disabled states not defined in source Figma.
checks.notes: Best-practice CSS added. Requires designer confirmation of visual treatment.

checks.description: All required interactive states implemented: Default, Hovered, Focused, Pressed, Current Page, Disabled, Overflow (closed), Overflow (opened with dropdown panel).
checks.notes: Pressed and Disabled are not from Figma — added per best practice. Overflow Opened state added after full manifest read.

checks.description: Overflow dropdown panel (page-jump) implemented from manifest-complete.json State=Opened, Size=Large/Small/Meduim, Overflow=Yes variants.
checks.notes: Panel is hidden by default (display: none). Shown when aria-expanded=true on the overflow trigger. Panel visibility is toggled by consumer JS.

checks.description: Focus indicator uses :focus-visible with 2px solid outline matching Figma Focused state. Never suppressed.
checks.notes: Uses outline (not border) to prevent layout shift. outline-offset: 0 matches Figma inset appearance.

checks.description: RTL support via [dir='rtl']. Arrows flip, item order reverses.
checks.notes: Requires RTL QA on real Arabic content.

checks.description: Pagination assembly uses semantic <nav> with proper ARIA attributes throughout.
